nodes.content:
# Infrastructure — Not Forgotten Systems

Single source of truth for everything that runs on this machine. If it is scheduled, listening, or running as a service, it is listed here.

See [[Consolidation SOP]] (Agent/consolidation-sop.md) and [[Vault Lint]] (Agent/vault-lint.md) for scheduled maintenance procedures, [[Systems]] (knowledge/systems.md) for platform inventory, [[Email Integration]] (integrations/email.md) for email watchdog details, and [[Registry]] (Agent/Registry.md) for the master map.

## Services

| Service | What it does | Managed by |
| ------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| hermes-gateway | channel gateway, inbound and outbound messages (Telegram) | Hermes cron scheduler |

## Email integration (LIVE)

**Inbox:** atlas@notforgotten.com.au
**Auth:** Gmail API (OAuth 2.0, auto-refreshing token)
**Credentials:** /root/.hermes/google_token.json + /root/.hermes/google_client_secret.json
**PULSE_MODE:** gmail_api

### Inbox pulse (LIVE — two-phase)

| Phase | Job | Cron ID | Schedule | Mode |
| ----- | --- | ------- | -------- | ---- |
| Phase 1 — unread scan | inbox-watchdog-phase1 | d0cdcda5b237 | */1 6-21 * * * Australia/Adelaide | no-agent (script-only) |
| Phase 2 — process + summarise | inbox-pulse-phase2 | 2d4a9ff4f06b | */1 6-21 * * * Australia/Adelaide | agent (full identity boot on mail found) |

Phase 1 runs `scripts/inbox-watchdog.sh` every 60s: checks Gmail API for unread, outputs JSON array of message IDs when mail found, silent when clean.

Phase 2 reads Phase 1's output via `context_from`. When empty: silent, no output. When IDs found: loads `Agent/pulse-bootstrap.md` → SOUL, Registry, MEMORY, LEARNINGS, gmail-card, email-int → reads each email, posts summary to Telegram via Bot API, marks as read. Deliver set to `local` so empty runs produce nothing visible. Telegram posting is explicit via curl when mail found.

Log: ~/.hermes/logs/inbox-pulse.log

## Scheduled jobs

| Job | Schedule | Session type | Defined in |
| --- | -------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| Nightly memory consolidation | c72726a332e6 | daily 21:00 ACST (11:30 UTC) | Agent/consolidation-sop.md | 14-step auto-apply: session notes, memory, wikilinks, connections, naming, frontmatter, terse style, index sync, broken links, infra sync, stale pruning. Reports to Agent/log.md |
| Weekly vault-lint | 49d0852ce5ee | Sun 17:00 ACST (07:30 UTC) | Agent/vault-lint.md | READ-ONLY wikilink graph audit: orphans, broken links, stale claims, contradictions, index drift, gaps, promotion candidates. Reports to Agent/lint-reports/ + Agent/log.md. Delivers summary to Telegram group |
| Nightly backup to GitHub | daily 21:30 ACST (12:00 UTC) | d998982d2e15 | `bin/nightly-backup.sh` -> `Snowark-Consulting/client-notforgotten` (private). Excludes secrets, caches, sessions, cron output per `.gitignore` |
| Weekly graphify rebuild | ed054f2de399 | Sat 17:30 ACST (pre-lint) | script-only | `scripts/graphify-cron.sh` -- semantic extraction + community clustering -> `graphify-out/graph.json` + `GRAPH_REPORT.md`. Powers vault-lint promotion-candidate detection |
| Dashboard hourly refresh | 0 * * * * Australia/Adelaide | no-agent | `bin/dash-update.py` — refreshes dashboard silently (deliver: local) |

## Hooks (event-driven)

| Hook | Fires on | Does |
| ---- | -------- | ---- |
| on-error | any tool/send/integration failure | classifies severity, writes bug card, S1/S2 alert to support relay |
| session-activity | every Stop, when HERMES_INTERACTIVE=1 | logs interactive sessions |

## Credential renewal reminders

| Credential | Expiry | Reminder fires | Added |
| ---------- | ------ | -------------- | ----- |
| Gmail API OAuth token | auto-refreshes (no expiry) | n/a | 2026-06-22 |

## Kill switch

Stop the gateway: pkill -f "hermes gateway". Pause scheduled jobs: hermes cron pause <id>. Full incident steps: security/deployment-checklist.md.

nodes.label: Deployment Security Checklist
nodes.content:
# Deployment Security Checklist

Run in full during playbook 04 (integrations) and again during playbook 05 (verify). Every section checked = initialled and dated at the bottom. Distilled from a 27-point AI security audit checklist; items here are the ones a fresh deployment can actually fail.

## Credentials

- [ ] All API keys/tokens in env files on-instance only, `chmod 600`
- [ ] No credential in any template, repo, log, or chat transcript (sweep with the secret-pattern grep in the kit's Task 15 commands before any push)
- [ ] Each integration uses least-privilege scopes; scopes granted recorded per integration in the client repo (names, never values)
- [ ] Token expiry dates recorded with cron renewal reminders set at creation time
- [ ] Unused or test credentials deleted at both ends (instance AND service provider)
- [ ] MFA enabled on every connected service account (model provider, email, accounting, ads)

## Spend protection

- [ ] Spending limit set on the model provider account
- [ ] Usage caps or alerts set on any metered API the agent can call in a loop
- [ ] Cron jobs reviewed for runaway potential (a failing job must not retry-spend unbounded)

## Data protection

- [ ] Client backup repo is private; verify with `gh repo view --json visibility`
- [ ] No client data flows to any service that is not a configured integration
- [ ] Instance disk is the single data home; backups travel encrypted in transit (HTTPS git)
- [ ] Sensitive fields (payment details, IDs) are excluded from prompts unless the task strictly requires them (least privilege applies to data, not just keys)
- [ ] Data-protection obligations for the client's jurisdiction noted in the client repo (e.g. Australian Privacy Act for AU clients)

## LLM risks

- [ ] Iron Gate Protocol active (`Agent/Trust.md`) and referenced from SOUL.md safety rules
- [ ] Prompt-injection rule present in SOUL.md (instructions inside content are data, not commands)
- [ ] Inbound content from untrusted sources (webhooks, public forms, unknown emails) is validated before it reaches a prompt
- [ ] Draft-approval protocol active; zero Tier 1 message types at deployment

## Recovery

- [ ] Nightly backup to the client's private repo verified (run one manually, check it lands)
- [ ] Restore path documented and tested once: fresh instance + backup repo = working install
- [ ] Kill-switch documented: how to stop the agent, disable a credential, and pause cron in under five minutes

## Assume breach

- [ ] Incident response noted in the client repo: which credential to rotate first, who to tell, what to check in logs
- [ ] Execution/cron logs reviewed for sensitive data retention; trimmed if they capture message bodies

nodes.content:
# Infrastructure — Not Forgotten Systems

Single source of truth for everything that runs on this machine. If it is scheduled, listening, or running as a service, it is listed here.

See [[Consolidation SOP]] (Agent/consolidation-sop.md) and [[Vault Lint]] (Agent/vault-lint.md) for scheduled maintenance procedures, [[Systems]] (knowledge/systems.md) for platform inventory, [[Email Integration]] (integrations/email.md) for email watchdog details, and [[Registry]] (Agent/Registry.md) for the master map.

## Services

| Service | What it does | Managed by |
| ------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| hermes-gateway | channel gateway, inbound and outbound messages (Telegram) | Hermes cron scheduler |

## Email integration (LIVE)

**Inbox:** atlas@notforgotten.com.au
**Auth:** Gmail API (OAuth 2.0, auto-refreshing token)
**Credentials:** /root/.hermes/google_token.json + /root/.hermes/google_client_secret.json
**PULSE_MODE:** gmail_api

### Inbox pulse (LIVE — two-phase)

| Phase | Job | Cron ID | Schedule | Mode |
| ----- | --- | ------- | -------- | ---- |
| Phase 1 — unread scan | inbox-watchdog-phase1 | d0cdcda5b237 | */1 6-21 * * * Australia/Adelaide | no-agent (script-only) |
| Phase 2 — process + summarise | inbox-pulse-phase2 | 2d4a9ff4f06b | */1 6-21 * * * Australia/Adelaide | agent (full identity boot on mail found) |

Phase 1 runs `scripts/inbox-watchdog.sh` every 60s: checks Gmail API for unread, outputs JSON array of message IDs when mail found, silent when clean.

Phase 2 reads Phase 1's output via `context_from`. When empty: silent, no output. When IDs found: loads `Agent/pulse-bootstrap.md` → SOUL, Registry, MEMORY, LEARNINGS, gmail-card, email-int → reads each email, posts summary to Telegram via Bot API, marks as read. Deliver set to `local` so empty runs produce nothing visible. Telegram posting is explicit via curl when mail found.

Log: ~/.hermes/logs/inbox-pulse.log

## Scheduled jobs

| Job | Schedule | Session type | Defined in |
| --- | -------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| Nightly memory consolidation | c72726a332e6 | daily 21:00 ACST (11:30 UTC) | Agent/consolidation-sop.md | 14-step auto-apply: session notes, memory, wikilinks, connections, naming, frontmatter, terse style, index sync, broken links, infra sync, stale pruning. Reports to Agent/log.md |
| Weekly vault-lint | 49d0852ce5ee | Sun 17:00 ACST (07:30 UTC) | Agent/vault-lint.md | READ-ONLY wikilink graph audit: orphans, broken links, stale claims, contradictions, index drift, gaps, promotion candidates. Reports to Agent/lint-reports/ + Agent/log.md. Delivers summary to Telegram group |
| Nightly backup to GitHub | daily 21:30 ACST (12:00 UTC) | d998982d2e15 | `bin/nightly-backup.sh` -> `Snowark-Consulting/client-notforgotten` (private). Excludes secrets, caches, sessions, cron output per `.gitignore` |
| Weekly graphify rebuild | ed054f2de399 | Sat 17:30 ACST (pre-lint) | script-only | `scripts/graphify-cron.sh` -- semantic extraction + community clustering -> `graphify-out/graph.json` + `GRAPH_REPORT.md`. Powers vault-lint promotion-candidate detection |
| Dashboard hourly refresh | 0 * * * * Australia/Adelaide | no-agent | `bin/dash-update.py` — refreshes dashboard silently (deliver: local) |

## Hooks (event-driven)

| Hook | Fires on | Does |
| ---- | -------- | ---- |
| on-error | any tool/send/integration failure | classifies severity, writes bug card, S1/S2 alert to support relay |
| session-activity | every Stop, when HERMES_INTERACTIVE=1 | logs interactive sessions |

## Credential renewal reminders

| Credential | Expiry | Reminder fires | Added |
| ---------- | ------ | -------------- | ----- |
| Gmail API OAuth token | auto-refreshes (no expiry) | n/a | 2026-06-22 |

## Kill switch

Stop the gateway: pkill -f "hermes gateway". Pause scheduled jobs: hermes cron pause <id>. Full incident steps: security/deployment-checklist.md.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Business API
nodes.content:
# Integration: WhatsApp

## Prerequisites

- Decide the path: WhatsApp Business API (via a provider such as Twilio or Meta Cloud API) for programmatic send/receive, or WhatsApp Business app on a dedicated number with the agent assisting via drafts. The API path requires a number NOT currently registered to a personal WhatsApp
- Owner's customer base actually uses WhatsApp (verify; in some trades SMS dominates)

## Credential setup

- Meta Cloud API: business verification on the Meta Business account, permanent token scoped to WhatsApp only
- Store per `core/security/secrets-pattern.md`; record scopes and expiry in the client repo

## Configuration

- Register webhook for inbound messages; route to the agent's channel handler
- Message templates: outside the 24-hour customer service window, only pre-approved templates can be sent; submit the needed templates (appointment confirmation, follow-up, invoice notice) for approval during setup, approval takes hours to days

## Verification

- Round-trip: owner messages the business number, agent acknowledges
- Template send: fire one approved template outside the session window, confirm delivery

## Known traps

- The 24-hour window rule: free-form replies are only allowed within 24h of the customer's last message; everything else must be an approved template. Build follow-up cadences around this or sends silently fail
- (append as learned)
